incorrects.description: Student filled slots incorrectly on first attempt

steps.text: Look at the panels. What numbers do you see in 4 × 5 = 20?

incorrects.description: Student filled slots incorrectly on second attempt

params.description: Both panels highlight to draw attention to the numbers.

steps.text: Write the left panel first: 4 × 5 = 20. Then write the right panel: 20 = 4 × 5. Use the exact numbers you see.

incorrects.description: Student filled slots incorrectly three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System fills slots one by one: 4, 5, 20, then 20, 4, 5. Both equations appear in order.

steps.text: The first three slots write 4 × 5 = 20. The next three write 20 = 4 × 5. Both equations describe the same rectangle. The equal sign means both sides have the same value.
